title: Aave to launch 'Aave Shield' after $50M token swap mishap
message_html: Aave to launch 'Aave Shield' after $50M token swap mishap ...
snippet: In a post-mortem of the incident, Aave clarified it was not slippage, but an illiquid market that caused the trader to lose over $50 million while swapping USDT for AAVE.
